name: Methodology Feedback
about: Propose a change or improvement to the Reasoner methodology
title: "[METHODOLOGY] "
labels: methodology
---

## Area

- [ ] FORGE cycle phases
- [ ] Structural markers
- [ ] Scoring rubric
- [ ] Confidence calibration
- [ ] Deliberation depth routing
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Skills (framing / deliberation / verification)
- [ ] Handoff protocol
- [ ] Other: ___

## Observed Behavior

(What happens today with the current methodology? Be specific.)

## Proposed Change

(What should happen instead?)

## Evidence

(Research papers, production observations, reasoned argument. "It feels better" is not sufficient evidence.)

## Impact

- **Breaking?** (Would this break existing Reasoner invocations?)
- **Token cost** (Does this add or remove instructions?)
- **Scope** (Does this pull any SPECTRA / APIVR-Δ / ATLAS / Scribe responsibilities into the Reasoner?)

## Alternatives Considered

(What other designs did you consider? Why did you reject them?)
